title: Job Opening Teacher at American Institute

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Teacher at American Institute
jsonLd.description:
Join the American Institute family as a Teacher in Mysuru. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About American Institute:
American Institute is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with American Institute!
